business_question: What are the top 10 products by total sales revenue in the last 30 days across all stores?
business_context: Retail managers want to identify the best-performing products over the last month to optimize inventory planning, promotions, and supplier negotiations.
chain_of_thought: Step 1: Identify all sales transactions from the last 30 days.
Step 2: Join sales fact data with product dimension data.
Step 3: Calculate total revenue and quantity sold for each product.
Step 4: Rank products by revenue in descending order.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    p.product_name,
    SUM(s.sales_amount) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(s.quantity_sold) AS total_units_sold
FROM `retail_dw.fact_sales` s
JOIN `retail_dw.dim_product` p
    ON s.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE s.sale_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
GROUP BY p.product_name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;
